title: PayClaw Agent Identity Extension
description: UCP extension schema for io.payclaw.common.identity. Defines the payload an agent includes in the checkout request under the 'io.payclaw.common.identity' key.

token.description: ES256-signed JWT issued by PayClaw. Verify locally with @payclaw/badge/verify — no API call required.

kid.description: Key ID used to sign the token. Matches a key in the JWKS at payclaw.io/.well-known/ucp.
